description: CompositionWhite printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with thre-quarter sleeves, has a square neckline with  Hakoba style tape detailing off the arm panels and has split sidesFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron insideEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this white printed kurta from w!
